popular_posts.title: Building a HIPAA-Aware Medical AI Platform in Go: An...
popular_posts.excerpt: What HIPAA looks like when you express it as Go interfaces — governance policies, append-only audit at DB GRANTs, PHI redaction at the logger seam, and HITL as the §3060 CDS carve-out criterion 4.
